query.name: monthTotals
query.sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN e.entry_type = 'income' THEN e.amount END), 0) AS income_total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN e.entry_type = 'expense' THEN e.amount END), 0) AS expense_total FROM ml_entry e WHERE e.user_id = ${@user_id} AND DATE_FORMAT(e.entry_date, '%Y-%m') = ${@year_month} #AND_CLAUSE#

query.name: byCategory
query.sql: SELECT c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, COALESCE(SUM(e.amount), 0) AS total_amount FROM ml_entry e INNER JOIN ml_category c ON c.id = e.category_id WHERE e.user_id = ${@user_id} AND DATE_FORMAT(e.entry_date, '%Y-%m') = ${@year_month} AND e.entry_type = ${@entry_type} #AND_CLAUSE# GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY total_amount DESC

query.name: matrixByMonthCategory
query.sql: SELECT s.bill_month, s.category_id, s.category_name, s.total_amount FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(e.entry_date, '%Y-%m') AS bill_month, c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, COALESCE(SUM(e.amount), 0) AS total_amount FROM ml_entry e INNER JOIN ml_category c ON c.id = e.category_id WHERE e.user_id = ${@user_id} AND e.entry_type = ${@entry_type} AND e.entry_date >= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(${@year_month_from}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AND e.entry_date < DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(${@year_month_to}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) #AND_CLAUSE# GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(e.entry_date, '%Y-%m'), c.id, c.name ) s ORDER BY s.bill_month ASC, s.category_name ASC

query.name: byDay
query.sql: SELECT DATE(e.entry_date) AS day_date, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN e.entry_type = 'income' THEN e.amount END), 0) AS income_amount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN e.entry_type = 'expense' THEN e.amount END), 0) AS expense_amount FROM ml_entry e WHERE e.user_id = ${@user_id} AND DATE_FORMAT(e.entry_date, '%Y-%m') = ${@year_month} #AND_CLAUSE# GROUP BY DATE(e.entry_date) ORDER BY day_date ASC
